era_context: Same as -900 and -901. Neo-Assyrian consolidation, Greek Archaic period, Western Zhou decline, Maya Classic period.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most of the world outside the Near East and Mediterranean
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: 902 BCE is not documented in any surviving historical source known to the training data. The absence of events reflects the reality of ancient historiography: year-by-year documentation is rare before the Common Era, and most surviving sources focus on major reigns, wars, or religious events rather than providing continuous annual records. This year is historically 'invisible' in the surviving record.
